calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Sandra Hefner, self represented Plaintiff appeared. At the request of plaintiff, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Continued To Sep-12-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to September 12, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610.
Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2023 Continued To Jul-11-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Sandra Hefner, self represented plaintiff appearing on her own behalf. The court vacates sanctions imposed on Dec-06-2022. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to July 11, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. The Court grants Ms. Hefner permission to appear via CourtCall for the next OSC hearing. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Continued To Mar-07-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400 for failure to appear. The order to show cause is continued to Mar-07-2023 at 10:30 am in Department 610. Judge Samuel K. Feng; Clerk VWU; Not Reported. (610)
